reasoning: Databricks has made no public announcement or S-1 filing as of May 22, 2025. Financial media in early 2025 (e.g., Bloomberg in March 2025) grouped Databricks with "perennially private" firms keeping their IPOs "on ice." With only ~5 weeks remaining between the knowledge cutoff and the July 1, 2025 resolution date, and absolutely no recent leaks about hiring underwriters or confidentially filing an S-1, the likelihood of a formal announcement or public S-1 filing in this very narrow window is extremely low.
